falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any daily session within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 equivalent support zone invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 78% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding that structural low, and failure would confirm this was not a bottom formation but distribution

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 28 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggests controlled fear/positioning reset; sustained VIX above 28 indicates panic escalation rather than orderly bottoming, breaking the volatility regime that defined the August 2024 bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >15bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The pattern match assumes cyclical bottoming with stabilizing credit conditions; acute curve flattening/inversion deepening would signal recession acceleration, invalidating the macro setup that produced the August 2024 bottom

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
